title: Diff Forge AI
excerpt: Diff Forge lets developers direct Codex, Claude Code and OpenCode in parallel by voice, vision and workflows, with a local safety kernel and secure control from any device—while your code stays local.
content_html:
In the Name of God, the Most Beneficent, the Most Merciful.

Inspiration

I am a Canadian and in end of February, I was in Medical School in Tehran, Iran with my little sister, when the war started. Even though I am a Canadian Citizen, they were not able to help us get out of Iran, so we went to the Pakistani Embassy, which organized buses out of Iran. 2 Days to reach the Taftan border between Iran and Pakistan, 2 days at the border, and a 16hr bus drive from Taftan to Quetta which is right under Afghanistan. It was very stressful. We eventually made it to Karachi Pakistan thanks to family members there and came back to Canada. When me and my little sister came back, I went back into making the most of my time by working on startups, and realized the landscaped had changed from copy pasting from Chatgpt to using Codex and Claude Code. This is where I learned about "Bridgemind" and the CEO, Matt, who not only is building the biggest vibe coding community in the world, but also was extremely supportive of his community members, including me. He streams on youtube and is making an Agentic Development Environment which inspired me to make my own, but open source.

I streamed for a few days while vibe coding for a bit (before I decided to lock in) and used GPT-5.5 as my daily driver which wrote over 85% of the code in my codebase, then after the latest models were released, I used Fable 5 to orchestrate GPT5.5, then GPT5.6 Sol Subagents and even let then run 8hr+ runs overnight as I sleep to build this amazing open source piece of software. I have three 20x Codex subs and three 20x Fable 5 subs, and am well known as a “Tokenmaxxer”.

What it does

Diff Forge AI is an open source Agentic Development Environment where developers can develop software, do AI assisted PCB Design, and even AI Video Editing. It has scaffolding for docs, skills, as well as session history so users can launch/return to a session with 1 click.

Diff Forge AI is designed to be the Vibe Coding Toolkit for Developers, featuring multi-terminal workspaces, Audio Dictation (local whisper), and Screen Capture Snipping (works on both MacOS and Windows).

The open source client is fully free to use, but on top of that, there is a paid subscription feature for cloud services such as:

  • Chat with an AI Agent on your devices through the web, via chat UI or direct terminal shell (web sockets)
  • Add Cellular Support to call your AI Agents managed via Voice Orchestrator as well as Cloud PBX (via Twilio)
  • Notifications for when AI Agents are done or need user_input_required
  • Loopspaces: Create cron jobs, web hooks, or manual triggers for specific workflows And many more features (currently I’m working on AI Email, and both inbound and outbound customer management). The goal is that the ADE Diff Forge AI is where you do all your work, and the web/cellular has both remote control capabilities as well as managing communication with your clients.

How we built it

Codex via VS Code Extension (gpt5.5 era). Without it this project would not exist, or would have taken over 5+ years. Yet I was able to do it alone with only a 200$ subscription and it basically 100x’ed my productivity.

Once Fable 5 released, I saw Theo T3s X post about using Fable 5 to orchestrate GPT-5.5 subagents, used his strategy (which was genuinely clever) and was able to get much more done much faster. The real breakthrough however happened when GPT-5.6 Sol released, it was much better at debugging than Fable 5 and caught way more than it, that I don’t even use adversarial Fable 5 subagents when GPT-5.6 Sol is reviewing. But the best thing that came out of GPT-5.6 Sol orchestrated by Fable 5, was the ability for it to do overnight runs while I slept like a baby. Insane how far AI has gotten. In total we used over 90 billion tokens over the past 2 months for the creation of this project.

Our project was made using:

  • Tauri for the Native Client (rust backend, react frontend)
  • NextJS for the Web App
  • Rust for the Cloud Services The Tauri Native Client also uses open source repos, for example, TSCircuit, which is an opensource project for designing PCBs with react, I simply added that to my Panel structure (which handles multiple terminals and non-terminal panels) and now AI Agents can modify a PCB Design right in the ADE. We used Xterm for Terminal rendering, Enigo Crate for Audio Dictation Insertions, and SCAP crate for Screen Capture/Snipping (which I feed to AI Agents when doing UI Work or have errors).

Challenges we ran into

Running out of Tokens. Thank you Tibo for Resets <3

Accomplishments that we're proud of

Over 888k lines of code across 4 codebases over 2 months, the rust-diffforge client itself is more than 550k lines of code now and is still growing. Complex, functional, compiles, pasts all tests, and is genuinely a technological leap to use the ADE directly, remotely or via cellular (which I do regularly so I can prompt while I’m out and about). Coolest thing is the BYOC (Bring Your Own Cloud) which I had Fable 5 and GPT-5.6 Sol setup, it created a cli (diffforge-cli) and basically after putting your cloud providers API key, it will use the client and auto install and authenticate the device to your account, essentially creating a remote agent from which you can do whatever you want with!

What we learned

Biggest thing I learned, was native app development. I mainly did SaaS development, so this was the first time I was building a native app and learned: MacOS is awesome and Windows is a pain to develop on (I use my MacBook Air M4 now). On top of that, learning about background processes, headless, creating a custom CLI for installing Diff Forge AI and launching it on npm, home-brew, chacalatey, and the difficulties of cross-platform support. Without QA and testing, it’s not possible. Thankfully I have a Windows and MacOS device, but I think I’ll need a linux one as well.

What's next for Diff Forge AI

Currently we are moving towards not only managing AI Agents via Web, but also managing your Customers via AI through contact lists, cellular and email through the web. The goal is that Diff Forge AI will have the toolkit for not only developing products, but also helping solopreneurs scale their business with AI efficiently.

sentences.en: In the Name of God, the Most Beneficent, the Most Merciful.
sentences.zh: 以最仁慈、最仁慈的真主之名。

blocks.html_en: Inspiration

sentences.en: Inspiration
sentences.zh: 灵感

blocks.html_en: I am a Canadian and in end of February, I was in Medical School in Tehran, Iran with my little sister, when the war started. Even though I am a Canadian Citizen, they were not able to help us get out of Iran, so we went to the Pakistani Embassy, which organized buses out of Iran. 2 Days to reach the Taftan border between Iran and Pakistan, 2 days at the border, and a 16hr bus drive from Taftan to Quetta which is right under Afghanistan. sentences.en: I am a Canadian and in end of February, I was in Medical School in Tehran, Iran with my little sister, when the war started.
sentences.zh: 我是加拿大人，二月底战争爆发时，我和妹妹正在伊朗德黑兰的医学院读书。

sentences.en: Even though I am a Canadian Citizen, they were not able to help us get out of Iran, so we went to the Pakistani Embassy, which organized buses out of Iran.
sentences.zh: 尽管我是加拿大公民，但他们无法帮助我们离开伊朗，所以我们去了巴基斯坦大使馆，他们组织了巴士离开伊朗。

sentences.en: 2 Days to reach the Taftan border between Iran and Pakistan, 2 days at the border, and a 16hr bus drive from Taftan to Quetta which is right under Afghanistan.
sentences.zh: 到达伊朗和巴基斯坦之间的塔夫坦边境需要 2 天，在边境需要 2 天，从塔夫坦到阿富汗境内的奎达需要 16 小时的巴士车程。

sentences.en: It was very stressful.
sentences.zh: 压力很大。

sentences.en: We eventually made it to Karachi Pakistan thanks to family members there and came back to Canada.
sentences.zh: 感谢那里的家人，我们最终到达了巴基斯坦卡拉奇并返回了加拿大。

sentences.en: When me and my little sister came back, I went back into making the most of my time by working on startups, and realized the landscaped had changed from copy pasting from Chatgpt to using Codex and Claude Code.
sentences.zh: 当我和我的妹妹回来后，我又开始充分利用自己的时间在初创公司工作，并意识到景观已经从 Chatgpt 的复制粘贴变成了使用 Codex 和 Claude Code。

sentences.en: This is where I learned about "Bridgemind" and the CEO, Matt, who not only is building the biggest vibe coding community in the world, but also was extremely supportive of his community members, including me.
sentences.zh: 在这里，我了解了“Bridgemind”和首席执行官 Matt，他不仅正在建立世界上最大的氛围编码社区，而且还非常支持他的社区成员，包括我。

sentences.en: He streams on youtube and is making an Agentic Development Environment which inspired me to make my own, but open source.
sentences.zh: 他在 youtube 上直播，正在制作一个代理开发环境，这激励我制作自己的开源环境。

blocks.html_en: I streamed for a few days while vibe coding for a bit (before I decided to lock in) and used GPT-5.5 as my daily driver which wrote over 85% of the code in my codebase, then after the latest models were released, I used Fable 5 to orchestrate GPT5.5, then GPT5.6 Sol Subagents and even let then run 8hr+ runs overnight as I sleep to build this amazing open source piece of software. I have three 20x Codex subs and three 20x Fable 5 subs, and am well known as a “Tokenmaxxer”.

sentences.en: I streamed for a few days while vibe coding for a bit (before I decided to lock in) and used GPT-5.5 as my daily driver which wrote over 85% of the code in my codebase, then after the latest models were released, I used Fable 5 to orchestrate GPT5.5, then GPT5.6 Sol Subagents and even let then run 8hr+ runs overnight as I sleep to build this amazing open source piece of software.
sentences.zh: 我在直播中进行了几天的氛围编码（在我决定锁定之前），并使用 GPT-5.5 作为我的日常驱动程序，它编写了我的代码库中超过 85% 的代码，然后在最新模型发布后，我使用 Fable 5 来编排 GPT5.5，然后是 GPT5.6 Sol 子代理，甚至让我在睡觉时运行 8 小时以上，以构建这个令人惊叹的开源软件。

sentences.en: I have three 20x Codex subs and three 20x Fable 5 subs, and am well known as a “Tokenmaxxer”.
sentences.zh: 我有三台 20x Codex 低音炮和三台 20x Fable 5 低音炮，我以“Tokenmaxxer”而闻名。

sentences.zh: Diff Forge AI 旨在成为面向开发人员的 Vibe 编码工具包，具有多终端工作区、音频听写（本地耳语）和屏幕捕获截图（适用于 MacOS 和 Windows）。

sentences.en: Chat with an AI Agent on your devices through the web, via chat UI or direct terminal shell (web sockets)
sentences.zh: 通过网络、聊天 UI 或直接终端 shell（网络套接字）与设备上的 AI 代理聊天

blocks.html_en: • Add Cellular Support to call your AI Agents managed via Voice Orchestrator as well as Cloud PBX (via Twilio)

sentences.en: Add Cellular Support to call your AI Agents managed via Voice Orchestrator as well as Cloud PBX (via Twilio)
sentences.zh: 添加蜂窝支持以呼叫通过 Voice Orchestrator 以及 Cloud PBX（通过 Twilio）管理的 AI 代理

blocks.html_en: • Notifications for when AI Agents are done or need user_input_required

sentences.en: Notifications for when AI Agents are done or need user_input_required
sentences.zh: AI 代理完成或需要 user_input_required 时的通知

The goal is that the ADE Diff Forge AI is where you do all your work, and the web/cellular has both remote control capabilities as well as managing communication with your clients.

sentences.en: Loopspaces: Create cron jobs, web hooks, or manual triggers for specific workflows And many more features (currently I’m working on AI Email, and both inbound and outbound customer management).
sentences.zh: Loopspaces：为特定工作流程创建 cron 作业、Web 挂钩或手动触发器以及更多功能（目前我正在研究 AI 电子邮件以及入站和出站客户管理）。

sentences.en: The goal is that the ADE Diff Forge AI is where you do all your work, and the web/cellular has both remote control capabilities as well as managing communication with your clients.
sentences.zh: 我们的目标是让 ADE Diff Forge AI 成为您完成所有工作的地方，并且网络/蜂窝网络具有远程控制功能以及管理与客户的通信功能。

sentences.zh: 《神鬼寓言 5》发布后，我看到 Theo T3s X 发布了有关使用《神鬼寓言 5》编排 GPT-5.5 子代理的帖子，使用了他的策略（非常聪明），并且能够更快地完成更多工作。

sentences.en: The real breakthrough however happened when GPT-5.6 Sol released, it was much better at debugging than Fable 5 and caught way more than it, that I don’t even use adversarial Fable 5 subagents when GPT-5.6 Sol is reviewing.
sentences.zh: 然而，真正的突破发生在 GPT-5.6 Sol 发布时，它的调试能力比《神鬼寓言 5》好得多，捕获的数据也比《神鬼寓言 5》要好得多，以至于我在审查 GPT-5.6 Sol 时甚至没有使用对抗性的《神鬼寓言 5》子代理。

sentences.en: But the best thing that came out of GPT-5.6 Sol orchestrated by Fable 5, was the ability for it to do overnight runs while I slept like a baby.
sentences.zh: 但《神鬼寓言 5》精心策划的 GPT-5.6 Sol 最好的一点是，它能够在我睡得像婴儿一样的时候进行夜间运行。

sentences.zh: 人工智能已经走了多远，真是太疯狂了。

sentences.zh: 在过去 2 个月里，我们总共使用了超过 900 亿个代币来创建这个项目。

sentences.zh: 我们使用 Xterm 进行终端渲染，使用 Enigo Crate 进行音频听写插入，使用 SCAP 箱进行屏幕捕获/截图（我在执行 UI 工作或出现错误时将其提供给 AI 代理）。

sentences.en: Accomplishments that we're proud of
sentences.zh: 我们引以为傲的成就

blocks.html_en: Over 888k lines of code across 4 codebases over 2 months, the rust-diffforge client itself is more than 550k lines of code now and is still growing. Complex, functional, compiles, pasts all tests, and is genuinely a technological leap to use the ADE directly, remotely or via cellular (which I do regularly so I can prompt while I’m out and about). Coolest thing is the BYOC (Bring Your Own Cloud) which I had Fable 5 and GPT-5.6 Sol setup, it created a cli (diffforge-cli) and basically after putting your cloud providers API key, it will use the client and auto install and authenticate the device to your account, essentially creating a remote agent from which you can do whatever you want with!

sentences.en: Over 888k lines of code across 4 codebases over 2 months, the rust-diffforge client itself is more than 550k lines of code now and is still growing.
sentences.zh: 2 个月内，rust-diffforge 客户端本身的代码已超过 55 万行，并且仍在增长，超过 2 个月的时间跨 4 个代码库编写了超过 88.8 万行代码。

sentences.en: Complex, functional, compiles, pasts all tests, and is genuinely a technological leap to use the ADE directly, remotely or via cellular (which I do regularly so I can prompt while I’m out and about).
sentences.zh: 复杂、实用、编译并通过了所有测试，直接、远程或通过蜂窝使用 ADE 确实是一次技术飞跃（我经常这样做，这样我就可以在外出时进行提示）。

sentences.en: Coolest thing is the BYOC (Bring Your Own Cloud) which I had Fable 5 and GPT-5.6 Sol setup, it created a cli (diffforge-cli) and basically after putting your cloud providers API key, it will use the client and auto install and authenticate the device to your account, essentially creating a remote agent from which you can do whatever you want with!
sentences.zh: 最酷的事情是 BYOC（自带云），我有 Fable 5 和 GPT-5.6 Sol 设置，它创建了一个 cli (diffforge-cli)，基本上在放置您的云提供商 API 密钥后，它将使用客户端并自动安装并验证设备到您的帐户，本质上创建一个远程代理，您可以从中做任何您想做的事情！

blocks.html_en: What we learned

sentences.en: What we learned
sentences.zh: 我们学到了什么

blocks.html_en: Biggest thing I learned, was native app development. I mainly did SaaS development, so this was the first time I was building a native app and learned: MacOS is awesome and Windows is a pain to develop on (I use my MacBook Air M4 now). On top of that, learning about background processes, headless, creating a custom CLI for installing Diff Forge AI and launching it on npm, home-brew, chacalatey, and the difficulties of cross-platform support. Without QA and testing, it’s not possible. Thankfully I have a Windows and MacOS device, but I think I’ll need a linux one as well.

sentences.en: Biggest thing I learned, was native app development.
sentences.zh: 我学到的最重要的事情是本机应用程序开发。

sentences.en: I mainly did SaaS development, so this was the first time I was building a native app and learned: MacOS is awesome and Windows is a pain to develop on (I use my MacBook Air M4 now).
sentences.zh: 我主要做 SaaS 开发，所以这是我第一次构建原生应用程序，并了解到：MacOS 非常棒，而 Windows 开发起来很痛苦（我现在使用我的 MacBook Air M4）。

sentences.en: On top of that, learning about background processes, headless, creating a custom CLI for installing Diff Forge AI and launching it on npm, home-brew, chacalatey, and the difficulties of cross-platform support.
sentences.zh: 最重要的是，了解后台进程、无头、创建自定义 CLI 来安装 Diff Forge AI 并在 npm、home-brew、chacalatey 上启动它，以及跨平台支持的困难。

sentences.en: Without QA and testing, it’s not possible.
sentences.zh: 如果没有质量保证和测试，这是不可能的。

sentences.en: Thankfully I have a Windows and MacOS device, but I think I’ll need a linux one as well.
sentences.zh: 值得庆幸的是，我有一台 Windows 和 MacOS 设备，但我想我还需要一台 Linux 设备。

blocks.html_en: What's next for Diff Forge AI

sentences.en: What's next for Diff Forge AI
sentences.zh: Diff Forge AI 的下一步是什么

blocks.html_en: Currently we are moving towards not only managing AI Agents via Web, but also managing your Customers via AI through contact lists, cellular and email through the web. The goal is that Diff Forge AI will have the toolkit for not only developing products, but also helping solopreneurs scale their business with AI efficiently.

sentences.en: Currently we are moving towards not only managing AI Agents via Web, but also managing your Customers via AI through contact lists, cellular and email through the web.
sentences.zh: 目前，我们不仅致力于通过网络管理人工智能代理，而且还通过网络通过联系人列表、手机和电子邮件通过人工智能管理您的客户。

sentences.en: The goal is that Diff Forge AI will have the toolkit for not only developing products, but also helping solopreneurs scale their business with AI efficiently.
sentences.zh: Diff Forge AI 的目标是不仅拥有用于开发产品的工具包，还可以帮助个体企业家利用人工智能有效地扩展业务。

content_html_zh:
以最仁慈、最仁慈的真主之名。

灵感

我是加拿大人，二月底战争爆发时，我和妹妹正在伊朗德黑兰的医学院读书。 尽管我是加拿大公民，但他们无法帮助我们离开伊朗，所以我们去了巴基斯坦大使馆，他们组织了巴士离开伊朗。 到达伊朗和巴基斯坦之间的塔夫坦边境需要 2 天，在边境需要 2 天，从塔夫坦到阿富汗境内的奎达需要 16 小时的巴士车程。 压力很大。 感谢那里的家人，我们最终到达了巴基斯坦卡拉奇并返回了加拿大。 当我和我的妹妹回来后，我又开始充分利用自己的时间在初创公司工作，并意识到景观已经从 Chatgpt 的复制粘贴变成了使用 Codex 和 Claude Code。 在这里，我了解了“Bridgemind”和首席执行官 Matt，他不仅正在建立世界上最大的氛围编码社区，而且还非常支持他的社区成员，包括我。 他在 youtube 上直播，正在制作一个代理开发环境，这激励我制作自己的开源环境。

我在直播中进行了几天的氛围编码（在我决定锁定之前），并使用 GPT-5.5 作为我的日常驱动程序，它编写了我的代码库中超过 85% 的代码，然后在最新模型发布后，我使用 Fable 5 来编排 GPT5.5，然后是 GPT5.6 Sol 子代理，甚至让我在睡觉时运行 8 小时以上，以构建这个令人惊叹的开源软件。 我有三台 20x Codex 低音炮和三台 20x Fable 5 低音炮，我以“Tokenmaxxer”而闻名。

它的作用

Diff Forge AI 是一个开源代理开发环境，开发人员可以在其中开发软件、进行 AI 辅助 PCB 设计，甚至进行 AI 视频编辑。 它具有文档、技能以及会话历史记录的支架，因此用户只需单击一下即可启动/返回会话。

Diff Forge AI 旨在成为面向开发人员的 Vibe 编码工具包，具有多终端工作区、音频听写（本地耳语）和屏幕捕获截图（适用于 MacOS 和 Windows）。

开源客户端完全免费使用，但除此之外，还有云服务的付费订阅功能，例如：

  • 通过网络、聊天 UI 或直接终端 shell（网络套接字）与设备上的 AI 代理聊天
  • 添加蜂窝支持以呼叫通过 Voice Orchestrator 以及 Cloud PBX（通过 Twilio）管理的 AI 代理
  • AI 代理完成或需要 user_input_required 时的通知
  • Loopspaces：为特定工作流程创建 cron 作业、Web 挂钩或手动触发器以及更多功能（目前我正在研究 AI 电子邮件以及入站和出站客户管理）。 我们的目标是让 ADE Diff Forge AI 成为您完成所有工作的地方，并且网络/蜂窝网络具有远程控制功能以及管理与客户的通信功能。

我们是如何构建它的

通过 VS Code 扩展进行 Codex（gpt5.5 时代）。 如果没有它，这个项目就不会存在，或者会花费 5 年以上的时间。 然而，我只需支付 200 美元的订阅费就可以独自完成这件事，它基本上使我的工作效率提高了 100 倍。

《神鬼寓言 5》发布后，我看到 Theo T3s X 发布了有关使用《神鬼寓言 5》编排 GPT-5.5 子代理的帖子，使用了他的策略（非常聪明），并且能够更快地完成更多工作。 然而，真正的突破发生在 GPT-5.6 Sol 发布时，它的调试能力比《神鬼寓言 5》好得多，捕获的数据也比《神鬼寓言 5》要好得多，以至于我在审查 GPT-5.6 Sol 时甚至没有使用对抗性的《神鬼寓言 5》子代理。 但《神鬼寓言 5》精心策划的 GPT-5.6 Sol 最好的一点是，它能够在我睡得像婴儿一样的时候进行夜间运行。 人工智能已经走了多远，真是太疯狂了。 在过去 2 个月里，我们总共使用了超过 900 亿个代币来创建这个项目。

我们的项目是使用：

  • Tauri 用于本机客户端（rust 后端、react 前端）
  • 用于 Web 应用程序的 NextJS
  • 用于云服务的 Rust Tauri Native Client 还使用开源存储库，例如 TSCircuit，这是一个用于使用 React 设计 PCB 的开源项目，我只是将其添加到我的面板结构（处理多个终端和非终端面板）中，现在 AI 代理可以直接在 ADE 中修改 PCB 设计。 我们使用 Xterm 进行终端渲染，使用 Enigo Crate 进行音频听写插入，使用 SCAP 箱进行屏幕捕获/截图（我在执行 UI 工作或出现错误时将其提供给 AI 代理）。

我们遇到的挑战

代币用完。 谢谢 Tibo 的重置 <3

我们引以为傲的成就

2 个月内，rust-diffforge 客户端本身的代码已超过 55 万行，并且仍在增长，超过 2 个月的时间跨 4 个代码库编写了超过 88.8 万行代码。 复杂、实用、编译并通过了所有测试，直接、远程或通过蜂窝使用 ADE 确实是一次技术飞跃（我经常这样做，这样我就可以在外出时进行提示）。 最酷的事情是 BYOC（自带云），我有 Fable 5 和 GPT-5.6 Sol 设置，它创建了一个 cli (diffforge-cli)，基本上在放置您的云提供商 API 密钥后，它将使用客户端并自动安装并验证设备到您的帐户，本质上创建一个远程代理，您可以从中做任何您想做的事情！

我们学到了什么

我学到的最重要的事情是本机应用程序开发。 我主要做 SaaS 开发，所以这是我第一次构建原生应用程序，并了解到：MacOS 非常棒，而 Windows 开发起来很痛苦（我现在使用我的 MacBook Air M4）。 最重要的是，了解后台进程、无头、创建自定义 CLI 来安装 Diff Forge AI 并在 npm、home-brew、chacalatey 上启动它，以及跨平台支持的困难。 如果没有质量保证和测试，这是不可能的。 值得庆幸的是，我有一台 Windows 和 MacOS 设备，但我想我还需要一台 Linux 设备。

Diff Forge AI 的下一步是什么

目前，我们不仅致力于通过网络管理人工智能代理，而且还通过网络通过联系人列表、手机和电子邮件通过人工智能管理您的客户。 Diff Forge AI 的目标是不仅拥有用于开发产品的工具包，还可以帮助个体企业家利用人工智能有效地扩展业务。
